positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for conclusion.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    bbc_two = sK0).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    bbc_three != bbc_two).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_member_of_pappys(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define starred_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define piloted_on(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negated_conclusion.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for negated_conclusion.tptp
1. ? [X0] : (is_member_of_pappys(X0) & starred_in(X0,badults)) [input(axiom)]
2. piloted_on(badults,bbc_three) [input(axiom)]
4. ? [X0,X1,X2] : (is_member_of_pappys(X0) & starred_in(X0,X1) & piloted_on(X1,X2) & (X2 = bbc_two | X2 = bbc_three)) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~? [X0,X1,X2] : (is_member_of_pappys(X0) & starred_in(X0,X1) & piloted_on(X1,X2) & (X2 = bbc_two | X2 = bbc_three)) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (~is_member_of_pappys(X0) | ~starred_in(X0,X1) | ~piloted_on(X1,X2) | (bbc_two != X2 & bbc_three != X2)) [ennf transformation 5]
7. ? [X0] : (is_member_of_pappys(X0) & starred_in(X0,badults)) => (is_member_of_pappys(sK0) & starred_in(sK0,badults)) [skolem symbol introduction]
8. is_member_of_pappys(sK0) & starred_in(sK0,badults) [skolemisation 1,7]
9. starred_in(sK0,badults) [cnf transformation 8]
10. is_member_of_pappys(sK0) [cnf transformation 8]
11. piloted_on(badults,bbc_three) [cnf transformation 2]
13. ~is_member_of_pappys(X0) | ~starred_in(X0,X1) | ~piloted_on(X1,X2) | bbc_three != X2 [cnf transformation 6]
16. ~piloted_on(X1,bbc_three) | ~starred_in(X0,X1) | ~is_member_of_pappys(X0) [equality resolution 13]
17. ~starred_in(X0,badults) | ~is_member_of_pappys(X0) [resolution 11,16]
18. ~is_member_of_pappys(sK0) [resolution 17,9]
19. $false [forward subsumption resolution 18,10]
% SZS output end Proof for negated_conclusion.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
